title: SUM doesn't work properly with OPTION - transitive
poc: SELECT ?path AS ?pathId SUM(?cost) AS ?pathCost MAX(?cost) AS ?pathMaxCost MAX(?dist) AS ?maxDistance COUNT(*) AS ?elementsInPath SUM(?dist) AS ?totalDistance WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.com/graphTraversal> { { SELECT ?s ?target ?cost WHERE { ?s <http://example.com/data/to> ?target . OPTIONAL { ?s <http://example.com/data/cost> ?cost } } } OPTION ( TRANSITIVE , t_direction 1 , t_in(?s) , t_out(?target) , t_min (0) , t_max (16) , t_step ('path_id') AS ?path , t_step ('step_no') AS ?dist ) . FILTER (?s = <http://example.com/data/A> && ?target = <http://example.com/data/A5>) } } GROUP BY ?path

key_bug_features: SUM aggregation not working correctly with transitive option
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_graph (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), cost INT);
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, name, cost) VALUES (1, 'Concept A', NULL), (2, 'Concept A1', 1), (3, 'Concept A2', 20), (4, 'Concept A3', 7), (5, 'Concept A5', 1);
SELECT id, name, COALESCE(cost, 0) AS cost FROM test_graph WHERE cost IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(cost) AS total_cost FROM test_graph WHERE cost IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name;
SELECT id, name, CASE WHEN cost IS NULL THEN 'No Cost' ELSE 'Has Cost' END AS cost_status FROM test_graph;
